data: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes: Whisk 2 cups flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 2 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp baking soda, and 1 tsp salt. Mix in 2 cups buttermilk, 2 large eggs, and 1/4 cup melted butter. Pour 1/4 cup scoops onto a hot greased griddle. Flip when bubbles pop on top and edges look dry. Serve hot with maple syrup.
